docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARGRAVE, CHARLES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY SHAO, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT HARGRAVE, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAO, JENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARGRAVE, CHARLES $650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00, COMPLAINT AMENDED TO $650 - WITH CONSENT OF DEFENDANT. $350 TO BE PAID BY 7/7/03. AFTER $300 PAID TO DEFENDANT, MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $50.00 EACH MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
